verified.notes: CCC Plus Waiver serves older adults, individuals with physical disabilities, and chronically ill/severely impaired individuals of any age—no age minimum specified for seniors. Program has no stated income or asset limits in available official sources. Phone number is Cover Virginia Call Center from official DMAS source. Program remains active as of April 2026 (waiver approval expires 09/30/2028).

verified.notes: Virginia Adult Services Program appears to refer to Adult Protective Services (APS); no income or asset limits found in official sources for seniors

programs.notes: Virginia Adult Services Program appears to refer to Adult Protective Services (APS); no income or asset limits found in official sources for seniors

programs.programName: Virginia Insurance Counseling and Assistance Program (VICAP)

verified.notes: VICAP is a free counseling program with no age, income, or asset eligibility requirements; serves Medicare beneficiaries including those under 65 with disabilities

programs.notes: VICAP is a free counseling program with no age, income, or asset eligibility requirements; serves Medicare beneficiaries including those under 65 with disabilities

verified.notes: Income limits based on 125% of federal poverty level (effective January 15, 2025 per DOL source). 2025 HHS poverty guidelines: $14,430 annual for individual, $21,060 for couple of 2. Calculated as 125% of these figures divided by 12 months. Virginia DARS and DOL sources confirm program is active and accepting participants as of 2026. No asset limits found in authoritative sources.
